**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Huadun Technology Co., Ltd. exemplifies an extreme divergence between an officially designated 'Manufacturing' status and an asset-light, conceptual business reality. Although categorized under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' with an ambitious scope claiming 'Integrated Circuit Manufacturing', its physical parameters render this impossible: it is located on the '11th Floor' of a corporate R&D park in Jianye District, Nanjing, with a paid-in capital of only 3M RMB and a mere 1 insured employee in 2024. Its actual operations—as revealed by its active email domains ('boss@quanchuang365.com') and core business scope—are rooted in AI software development, IT system integration, tech brokerage, and equity/venture capital investment. This entity functions purely as a tech incubator shell, an IT consultancy, or a micro-investment vehicle masquerading as a high-tech hardware manufacturer.
